<!--
Thanks for contributing to luplo! Please fill out the sections below.
A CLA will eventually be required for external contributions; we'll
wire up the bot before that is enforced.
-->

## Summary

What does this PR do? One or two sentences on the change and the why.

## Related issues

Closes #, Refs #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing behaviour)
- [ ] Docs-only
- [ ] Chore / internal (CI, refactor, dependency bumps)

## Testing

How did you verify this works?

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check` passes
- [ ] `uv run pyright` passes
- [ ] Migration runs cleanly on a fresh DB (if schema changed)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected CLI / MCP tool / HTTP route

## Changelog

Have you added an entry under `[Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md`?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] N/A (internal / docs-only)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything non-obvious: design tradeoffs, alternatives considered,
follow-up work you're deferring.
